subcodes.first_line: O servant of the sacred Threshold! Praise be to God, thou art the noble descendant of that illustrious personage who, from the dawn of life until the day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس الحمد لله سلیل نبیل آنشخص جلیلی که از بدایت حیات تا یوم
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @visitation Tablets, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
